question_en: Consider the following statements about democratic governments. Which statement is not correct?

In a democracy, people have the right to elect their leaders.
Democracy is also known as oligarchy.
options_hi: लोकतंत्र को प्रतिनिधात्मक लोकतंत्र के रूप में जाना जाता है।
लोकतंत्र सार्वभौमिक वयस्क मताधिकार की गारंटी देता है।
लोकतंत्र में लोगों को अपने नेताओं को निर्वाचित करने का अधिकार होता है।
लोकतंत्र को अल्पतंत्र के रूप में भी जाना जाता है।
subject: general-awareness
explanation: Democracy means rule by the people, whereas oligarchy means rule by a few. They are fundamentally different.
fingerprint: consider the following statements about democratic governments which statement is not correct

question_en: Match the items given in Column I with the items given in Column II: (A) Chloroplast - (I) Leguminous plant, (B) Rhizobium - (II) Parasitic plant, (C) Cuscuta (Amarbel) - (III) Leaf, (D) Pitcher plant - (IV) Insectivorous plant.

subject: general-science

question_en: Two statements are followed by two conclusions (I) and (II). Assuming the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follows from the given statements. Statements: Some dogs are fishes. Some fishes are birds. Conclusions: (I) Some dogs are birds. (II) Some birds are dogs.
question_hi: दो कथन और उसके बाद दो निष्कर्ष (I) और (II) दिए गए हैं। दिए गए कथनों को सत्य मानते हुए चाहे वे सामान्य ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न ही क्यों न प्रतीत होते हों, निर्णय करें कि कौन सा/से निष्कर्ष दिए गए कथनों के आधार पर तर्कसंगत रूप से निकलता है / निकलते हैं। कथन: कुछ कुत्ते मछलियाँ हैं। कुछ मछलियाँ पक्षी हैं। निष्कर्ष : (I) कुछ कुत्ते पक्षी हैं। (II) कुछ पक्षी कुत्ते हैं।
options_hi: न तो निष्कर्ष (I) और न ही (II) निकलता है।
subject: reasoning
explanation: There is no direct relation between dogs and birds given in the statements. Hence neither conclusion logically follows.
fingerprint: two statements are followed by two conclusions i and ii assuming the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts decide which of the given conclusions logically follows from the given statements statements some dogs are fishes some fishes are birds conclusions i some dogs are birds ii some birds are dogs

subject: reasoning
explanation: Just as mosquitoes carry malaria, rats are associated with spreading plague.
fingerprint: select the option that is related to the third term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term mosquito malaria rat

question_en: Below a group of English letters is given in jumbled order. Select the combination of numbers according to which arranging the letters will form a meaningful word. L N S A I G (1 2 3 4 5 6)
question_hi: नीचे अंग्रेजी अक्षरों के समूह को अव्यवस्थित क्रम में दिया गया है। संख्याओं के उस संयोजन का चयन करे जिसके अनुसार अक्षरों को व्यवस्थित करने पर एक अर्थपूर्ण शब्द बनें। L N S A I G 1 2 3 4 5 6
subject: reasoning
explanation: The meaningful word is 'SIGNAL'. The sequence of the letters S I G N A L corresponds to 3, 5, 6, 2, 4, 1.
fingerprint: below a group of english letters is given in jumbled order select the combination of numbers according to which arranging the letters will form a meaningful word l n s a i g 1 2 3 4 5 6

question_en: If in a certain code language 'MUSSOORIE' is written as 'OTURQNTHG', then how will 'DELHI' be written in the same code language?
question_hi: यदि एक निश्चित कूटभाषा में ‘MUSSOORIE’ को ‘OTURQNTHG’ लिखा जाता है, तो उसी कूटभाषा में ‘DELHI’ को क्या लिखा जाएगा ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The pattern alternates between +2 and -1. M+2=O, U-1=T, S+2=U, S-1=R, O+2=Q, O-1=N, R+2=T, I-1=H, E+2=G. For DELHI: D+2=F, E-1=D, L+2=N, H-1=G, I+2=K. So it is FDNGK.
fingerprint: if in a certain code language mussoorie is written as oturqnthg then how will delhi be written in the same code language

question_en: Read the information given below and answer the given question. A * B means 'B is the brother of A'. A $ B means 'A is the wife of B'. A # B means 'B is the son of A'. If 'P $ Q * R # S', then which of the following statements is true?
question_hi: नीचे दी गई जानकारी को पढ़कर दिये गए प्रश्न का उत्तर दें। A * B का अर्थ है, ‘B, A का भाई है’। A $ B का अर्थ है , ‘A, B की पत्नी है’। A # B का अर्थ है , ‘B, A का पुत्र है’। यदि ‘P $ Q * R # S’ है, तो नीचे दिया गया कौन सा कथन सत्य है ?
options_en: R is the father of Q.
S is the nephew of Q.
S is the son of P.
R is the father-in-law of P.
subject: reasoning
explanation: P $ Q means P is the wife of Q. Q * R means R is the brother of Q. R # S means S is the son of R. Therefore, S is the son of R, who is Q's brother, so S is the nephew of Q.
fingerprint: read the information given below and answer the given question a b means b is the brother of a a b means a is the wife of b a b means b is the son of a if p q r s then which of the following statements is true

question_en: Find the missing term __?__ in the given series. 125, 25, 5, __?__, 1/5, 1/25, 1/125
subject: reasoning
explanation: Each term is divided by 5 to get the next term. 5 / 5 = 1.
fingerprint: find the missing term in the given series 125 25 5 15 125 1125

question_en: Sarita walks 24m towards West, turns right and walks 24m. After this she turns left and walks 16m. Again she turns left and walks 24m. How far and in which direction is Sarita now from her starting point?
question_hi: सरिता 24m पश्चिम की ओर चलने के बाद अपने दाएँ मुड़कर 24m चलती है इसके बाद वह अपने बाएँ मुड़ती है और 16 M चलती है। पुनः वह अपने बाएँ मुड़कर 24 M चलती है। सरिता अब अपने आरंभिक बिंदु से कितनी दूर तथा किस दिशा में है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: She goes 24m West, turns right (North) for 24m, turns left (West) for 16m, turns left (South) for 24m. Net movement is 24m + 16m = 40m West.
fingerprint: sarita walks 24m towards west turns right and walks 24m after this she turns left and walks 16m again she turns left and walks 24m how far and in which direction is sarita now from her starting point

question_en: Six friends P, Q, R, S, T and U are standing in a row facing North, but not necessarily in the same order. 'P' is to the left of 'T' and right of 'R'. 'Q' is to the right of 'T' but left of 'S' and 'S' is to the left of 'U'. Who are the neighbors of 'Q'?
question_hi: छह मित्र P, Q, R, S, T और U उत्तर की ओर मुँह करके एक पंक्ति में खड़े हैं, लेकिन आवश्यक नहीं है कि उसी क्रम में हो। ‘P’, T के बाएँ और ‘R’ के दाएँ है। ‘Q’, T’ के दाएँ लेकिन ‘S’ के बाएँ है और ‘S’, ‘U’ के बाएँ ओर है। ‘Q’ के पड़ोसी कौन हैं ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The order is R P T Q S U. So, neighbors of Q are T and S.
fingerprint: six friends p q r s t and u are standing in a row facing north but not necessarily in the same order p is to the left of t and right of r q is to the right of t but left of s and s is to the left of u who are the neighbors of q

question_en: Priyanka's birthday is on the third Friday of a month. The fourth day of the same month is the first Monday of the month. What is the date of Priyanka's birthday?
question_hi: प्रियंका का जन्मदिन किसी महीने के तीसरे शुक्रवार को है। उसी महीने का चौथा दिन महीने का पहला सोमवार है। प्रियंका का जन्मदिन का दिनांक क्या ক্ষমতায় है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: If the 4th is the first Monday, the 1st was Friday. The Fridays will be on 1st, 8th, and 15th. Thus, the 3rd Friday is the 15th.
fingerprint: priyankas birthday is on the third friday of a month the fourth day of the same month is the first monday of the month what is the date of priyankas birthday

question_en: A number was divided into two parts such that adding 5 times the first part to 11 times the second part gave 7 times the whole number. The ratio of the first part to the second part is:

subject: maths

question_en: In how many years will a sum of ₹800 amount to ₹926.10 at 10% per annum compound interest when the interest is compounded half-yearly?
question_hi: कितने वर्षों में, ₹800 की राशि 10% वार्षिक चक्रवृद्धि ब्याज की दर से ₹926.10 हो जाएगी जबकि व्याज प्रति छमाही संयोजित होता है ?
subject: maths
explanation: Rate = 10/2 = 5% per half year. A = P(1 + r/100)^n. 926.10/800 = (1.05)^n => 9261/8000 = (21/20)³. Thus n=3 half-years, which is 1.5 years.
fingerprint: in how many years will a sum of 800 amount to 92610 at 10 per annum compound interest when the interest is compounded halfyearly

subject: maths
explanation: Current milk = 15L, water = 5L. New ratio = (15+x)/5 = 4/1. 15+x = 20 => x = 5L.

subject: maths
explanation: SP = (4/3)CP. Profit = SP - CP = (1/3)CP. Profit % = (Profit/CP)*100 = (1/3)*100 = 33 1/3 %.

question_en: A can do 1/4th of a work in 10 days, B takes 20 days to do 40% of the same work, while C can do 1/3rd of the same work in 13 days. Who among the three can complete the whole work in the minimum time?
question_hi: A एक कार्य का 1/4 भाग 10 दिन में कर सकता है, B उसी कार्य का 40% भाग करने में 20 दिन लगाता है जबकि C उसी कार्य का 1/3 भाग 13 दिन में कर सकता है। तीनों में कौन उस पूरे कार्य को सबसे कम समय में कर सकता है ?
subject: maths
explanation: Time taken by A = 10 * 4 = 40 days. Time taken by B = 20 * (100/40) = 50 days. Time taken by C = 13 * 3 = 39 days. C takes the minimum time.

subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Haryana was carved out of Punjab and became a separate full-fledged state on November 1, 1966.
fingerprint: in which year did haryana become a fullfledged state

question_en: How many Legislative Assembly constituencies are there in Haryana?
question_hi: हरियाणा में कितने विधान सभा निर्वाचन क्षेत्र है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: There are 90 members in the Haryana Legislative Assembly.
fingerprint: how many legislative assembly constituencies are there in haryana

question_en: Who among the following former members of the Union Public Service Commission was an IAS officer from the Haryana cadre?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में कौन संघ लोक सेवा आयोग के पूर्व सदस्यों में से हरियाणा काडर के भारतीय प्रशासनिक सेवा के अधिकारी थे?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: S.K. Mishra was an IAS officer of the Haryana cadre who later became a member/official in various central bodies.
fingerprint: who among the following former members of the union public service commission was an ias officer from the haryana cadre

question_en: Which of the following is not a part of Haryana's canal network system?

subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Indus river system does not flow through or supply water to Haryana's canal network.
fingerprint: which of the following is not a part of haryanas canal network system

question_en: Which of the following districts of Haryana shares its borders with both Punjab and Rajasthan?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से हरियाणा का कौन सा जिला पंजाब और राजस्थान के साथ सीमा साझा करता है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Sirsa district is located in the extreme west of Haryana and shares its borders with both Punjab and Rajasthan.
fingerprint: which of the following districts of haryana shares its borders with both punjab and rajasthan

question_en: Which is the state animal of Haryana?
question_hi: हरियाणा का राज्य पशु कौन सा है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Blackbuck (Kala Hiran) is the state animal of Haryana.
fingerprint: which is the state animal of haryana

question_en: Which of the following is not a part of the traditional attire of Haryana?
question_hi: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा हरियाणा का पारंपरिक पोशाक का हिस्सा नहीं है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Daman, Pagri (Khandwa), and Chundar are part of traditional Haryanvi attire. 'Chorno' is not.
fingerprint: which of the following is not a part of the traditional attire of haryana

question_en: Where is the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary located?
question_hi: बीर शिकारगढ़ वन्यजीव अभ्यारण्य कहाँ अवस्थित है?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district, Haryana.
fingerprint: where is the bir shikargah wildlife sanctuary located

question_en: How much one-time cash award is given to a 'Kirti Chakra' awardee?
question_hi: ‘कीर्ति चक्र’ पुरस्कार विजेता को कितने एकबारगी नकद धन राशि दी जाती है?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Haryana government increased the cash reward for Kirti Chakra winners to ₹51 lakh initially, but later awards/options specified an amount. According to the official answer key, the correct option marked was ₹51,00,000.
fingerprint: how much onetime cash award is given to a kirti chakra awardee

question_en: Where is the Chinkara Breeding Centre located?
question_hi: चिंकारा प्रजनन केन्द्र कहाँ अवस्थित है?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Chinkara Breeding Centre is located at Kairu village in Bhiwani district.
fingerprint: where is the chinkara breeding centre located

question_en: Where is the Indian Institute of Management located in Haryana?
question_hi: भारतीय प्रबंधन संस्थान हरियाणा में कहाँ अवस्थित है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Indian Institute of Management (IIM) in Haryana is located in Rohtak.
fingerprint: where is the indian institute of management located in haryana

question_en: At which place are the two most important monuments of the state, 'Lat and Humayun Mosque', located?
question_hi: राज्य के दो सबसे महत्वपूर्ण स्मारक “लाट और हुमायूं मस्जिद” किस स्थान पर स्थित हैं ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Lat (Pillar) of Firoz Shah Tughlaq and Humayun's Mosque are prominent historical monuments located in Fatehabad.
fingerprint: at which place are the two most important monuments of the state lat and humayun mosque located

question_en: Identify the place where Guru Gobind Singh stayed for 52 days after the war with the hill kings?
question_hi: उस जगह की पहचान कीजिए जहाँ गुरु गोविंद सिंह पहाड़ी राजाओं के साथ युद्ध के बाद 52 दिनों तक रूके थे ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Guru Gobind Singh stayed at Gurudwara Kapal Mochan (Bilaspur, Yamunanagar) for 52 days after the battle of Bhangani in 1687.
fingerprint: identify the place where guru gobind singh stayed for 52 days after the war with the hill kings

question_en: The third battle of Panipat took place between which of the following?
question_hi: पानीपत का तीसरा युद्ध निम्नलिखित में से किसके बीच हुआ था ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The Third Battle of Panipat took place in 1761 between the Maratha Empire and the invading Afghan army of Ahmad Shah Abdali.
fingerprint: the third battle of panipat took place between which of the following

question_en: Which day of every month is celebrated as 'Tithi Bhojan Beti Ka Janamdin School Mein Abhinandan'?
question_hi: प्रत्येक माह का कौन-सा दिन “तिथि भोजन बेटी का जन्मदिन स्कूल में अभिनंदन ” के रूप में मनाया जाता है?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: In Haryana schools, the 3rd Tuesday of the month is celebrated under this initiative to promote girls' welfare and nutrition.
fingerprint: which day of every month is celebrated as tithi bhojan beti ka janamdin school mein abhinandan

question_en: According to the State of Environment Report, 2022, what is the rank of Haryana state in achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDG 2030)?
question_hi: भारत की पर्यावरण रिपोर्ट, 2022 के अनुसार सतत विकास लक्ष्य (एसडीजी 2030) हासिल करने में हरियाणा राज्य का कौन-सा स्थान है ?
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: According to the official answer key for this exam, the rank marked is Eighth (options vary by report context).
fingerprint: according to the state of environment report 2022 what is the rank of haryana state in achieving the sustainable development goals sdg 2030

question_en: Consider the following statements about the Widow Pension, a state scheme of Haryana state. (A) Women aged 21 years and above are eligible. (B) An allowance of ₹ 1,800 per month is given in it.
question_hi: हरियाणा राज्य की एक राज्य योजना विधवा पेंशन के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार कीजिए। (A) 21 वर्ष और इससे अधिक आयु की महिला पात्र है। (B) इसमें ₹ 1,800 प्रति माह भत्ता दिया जाता है।
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: The eligibility age is usually 18 years and above, and the allowance amount had been increased way beyond ₹ 1,800 (it was ₹2,750 at the time of the exam). Hence, neither is correct.
fingerprint: consider the following statements about the widow pension a state scheme of haryana state a women aged 21 years and above are eligible b an allowance of 1800 per month is given in it

question_en: Consider the following statements about Gross State Domestic Product (GSDP). (A) Haryana's GSDP is higher than Karnataka's GSDP. (B) Maharashtra's GSDP is higher than Haryana's GSDP.
question_hi: सकल राज्य घरेलू उत्पाद (जी.एस.डी.पी.) के बारे में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार कीजिए। (A) हरियाणा का जी. एस. डी. पी. कर्नाटक के जी.एस.डी.पी. से अधिक है। (B) महाराष्ट्र का जी. एस. डी. पी. हरियाणा के जी.एस.डी.पी. से अधिक है।
subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Haryana's GSDP is lower than Karnataka's GSDP. Maharashtra has the highest GSDP in India, which is naturally higher than Haryana's. So only B is correct.
fingerprint: consider the following statements about gross state domestic product gsdp a haryanas gsdp is higher than karnatakas gsdp b maharashtras gsdp is higher than haryanas gsdp
